title: KKR Makes Largest Ever Clean Energy Investment With $4.2B EDF Purchase
summary: Global investment firm KKR has agreed to acquire EDF Power Solutions North America in a landmark $4.2-billion deal, marking the largest single renewable energy investment in the company’s history.
